title:
Senior Software Engineer
Senior Software Engineer with verification
description:
About the job
eToro is a global trading and investing platform founded in 2007 with the vision of making investing simple, transparent, and collaborative. The platform empowers users to invest, share, and learn from one another by enabling visibility into other investors’ portfolios, performance statistics, and strategies. Today, eToro has over 40 million registered users across 75 countries, operates in 20 languages, and employs more than 1,500 people across 10+ offices globally. In May 2025, eToro listed on Nasdaq and continues to scale as an innovative, fast-growing fintech.
In 2024, eToro acquired Spaceship, an Australian investing platform built on the belief that investing should be simple, engaging, and meaningful. Spaceship offers products including Spaceship Voyager, Spaceship Super, and US Investing, helping Australians grow their wealth and take control of their financial futures. As part of eToro, Spaceship is now entering an exciting phase of growth, connecting local Australian investing experiences with a global investing platform.
We’re looking for a Frontend Software Engineer to join our frontend team building the digital experience for Spaceship. You’ll work across our React Native codebase powering native iOS and Android apps, as well as our web platform, shipping features that directly impact how people build their financial future. This role sits within the Spaceship product and plays a key part in the ongoing integration and transition between Spaceship and eToro, working closely with local and global engineering and product teams.
This role does not own a single financial product or a fixed slice of platform infrastructure. Instead, you’ll lead end-to-end digital initiatives that enhance how customers experience and use our financial products — from discovery and onboarding through to investing, servicing, and cross-product engagement.
The scope of work spans:
Spaceship Voyager
Spaceship Super
US Investing
eToro, including the integration between Spaceship and eToro
Projects in this role may include (but are not limited to): onboarding and account flows, identity and verification, money movement, portfolio and performance experiences, cross-product navigation, shared tooling, and ecosystem-level features that make investing feel coherent, intuitive, and trustworthy.
This is a high-impact individual contributor role with influence. There is no people management responsibility in the foreseeable future; impact is delivered through ownership, execution, and cross-team influence.
You’ll help shape how customers experience Spaceship end-to-end, while partnering closely with Financial Product Managers, Engineering, Design, Risk & Compliance, Customer Support, and Operations.
What you’ll do
You’ll own projects end-to-end, from technical design through to production deployment. This includes writing production-ready code, making architectural decisions, and establishing patterns that influence how we build and scale our products.
Product development
Partner closely with Product Managers and Engineers to take features from concept to launch
Design and build frontend features and components across mobile and web
Create responsive user interfaces that deliver fast, reliable user experiences
Translate business requirements into stable, high-performance software
Code quality & engineering practices
Write scalable, robust, testable, and maintainable code
Participate in code reviews and help set technical standards across the codebase
Contribute to architectural and design decisions
Build and maintain shared components, patterns, and our design system
Development lifecycle
Take part in sprint planning, design, implementation, testing, and production releases
Help triage bugs, track defects, and ensure platform stability
Write tests to catch regressions and ensure long-term reliability



Requirements: 

What you’ll bring
Strong experience building React Native mobile applications
Hands-on experience with React Native / Expo codebases
Experience building React web applications
Ability to work across mobile and web implementations of the same features
Experience with GraphQL
Strong TypeScript proficiency
Experience with testing frameworks such as Jest, React Testing Library, and E2E testing
Clear communicator in code reviews and technical discussions
A self-directed engineer who can make architectural decisions and drive implementation
Nice to have
Full-stack experience, including working with GraphQL services (written in Go)
Experience with Expo Router (file-based routing)
Experience with Tamagui or similar cross-platform UI libraries
Experience building or contributing to design systems
Storybook experience for component documentation
Exposure to native mobile code (Swift / Kotlin) for debugging
Familiarity with financial services products or regulatory environments
Experience working in monorepo architectures
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and mobile app deployment (TestFlight, Play Store)
 Benefits:
Competitive salary and bonus 
Additional leave allowance
Emphasis on a healthy work/life balance
Hybrid working model
This role will be based in our Sydney office, and candidates must have full working rights in Australia.
